testcase.name: test_put_reminder_preferences_update_in_app
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_reminder_preferences.py:107: in test_put_reminder_preferences_update_in_app assert response.status_code == 200, f"PUT failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: PUT failed: {"detail":"CSRF token missing","error_code":"CSRF_MISSING"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
